'''Shuttle 37''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] originally designed to supply the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] in the [[Wistril system/Legends|Wistril system]].

During the [[Thrawn campaign]], [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] stole the shuttle on [[Wistril]] and used it to gain entry to the ''Chimaera'' and [[Rescue on the Chimaera|rescue]] [[Talon Karrde]].

{{Stub}}
